creator: tom@tomjudge.com
text:
sysutils/cdrtools will not fetch when behind a proxy.

This seems to be a side affect of the environment scrubbing in the make file.

How-To-Repeat: building cdrtools-3.00_1 in directory /tinderbox/8.1-amd64
build started at Tue Nov 16 21:32:18 UTC 2010
port directory: /usr/ports/sysutils/cdrtools
building for:  8.1-RELEASE amd64
maintained by: marius@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident: $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/cdrtools/Makefile,v 1.82 2010/09/22 19:51:27 marius Exp $
prefixes: LOCALBASE=usr/local PREFIX=/usr/local
Begin Configuration:
---Begin Environment---
ARCH=amd64
PACKAGE_BUILDING=1
USER=root
CCACHE_DIR=
BRANCH=RELEASE
WANT_MYSQL_VER=50
CCACHE_NOLINK=1
HOST_WORKDIR=
BATCH=1
APACHE_PORT=www/apache22
OLDPWD=/
HOME=/root
LOG_DIRECTORY=
PAGER=more
LOG_DOCOPY=0
PKGZIPCMD=bzip2
HAVE_MOTIF=1
FTP_TIMEOUT=900
HTTP_TIMEOUT=900
defaultUpdateHost=cvsup18.FreeBSD.org
pb=/tinderbox
DISTFILE_CACHE=/tinderbox/distfiles
WITHOUT_X11=yes
OSREL=8.1
defaultUpdateType=CSUP
http_proxy=http://proxy.chicago.mintel.ad:3128/
BLOCKSIZE=K
TINDERD_LOGFILE=/dev/null
PORTOBJFORMAT=elf
WRKDIRPREFIX=/work
DISTDIR=/tmp/distfiles
DISTCACHE=/distcache
CCACHE_LOGFILE=
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin
ftp_proxy=http://proxy.chicago.mintel.ad:3128/
PACKAGES=/tmp/packages
TIMEOUT=7200
PKGSUFFIX=.tbz
OSVERSION=801000
OPTIONS_ENABLED=1
__DSVERSION__=3.0
TINDERD_SLEEPTIME=10
UNAME_n=tinderbox.host
__MKLVL__=1
CCACHE_JAIL=0
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
PORT_DBDIR=/var/db/ports
CCACHE_MAX_SIZE=1G
DISTFILE_URI=
X_WINDOW_SYSTEM=xorg
WITH_PGSQL_VER=90
MASTER_SITE_OVERRIDE=file:///distcache/${DIST_SUBDIR}/ 
OPTIONS_DIR=/options
UNAME_r=8.1-RELEASE
USA_RESIDENT=YES
UNAME_s=FreeBSD
PARALLEL_PACKAGE_BUILD=1
PWD=/usr/ports/sysutils/cdrtools
FTP_PROXY=http://proxy.chicago.mintel.ad:3128/
HTTP_PROXY=http://proxy.chicago.mintel.ad:3128/
UNAME_v=FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE #0: Tue Nov 16 21:25:37 UTC 2010    root@tinderbox.host:/usr/src/sys/magic/kernel/path
FTP_PASSIVE_MODE=yes
CCACHE_ENABLED=0
EDITOR=vi
INDEXFILE=INDEX-8
---End Environment---

---Begin OPTIONS List---
---End OPTIONS List---

End Configuration.
FETCH_DEPENDS=
PATCH_DEPENDS=
EXTRACT_DEPENDS=
BUILD_DEPENDS=gettext-0.18.1.1.tbz libiconv-1.13.1_1.tbz gmake-3.81_4.tbz
RUN_DEPENDS=libiconv-1.13.1_1.tbz gettext-0.18.1.1.tbz
add_pkg
================================================================
====================<phase 1: make checksum>====================

You may use the following build option(s):

WITH_CDDA2MP3=yes	builds with cdda2mp3 (requires audio/lame)
WITH_CDDA2OGG=yes	builds with cdda2ogg (requires audio/vorbis-tools)
WITH_RSCSI=yes		builds with the rscsi daemon which provides access to
			local SCSI-devices over the network (the client-side
			in cdda2wav, cdrecord, etc. is built unconditionally).
			BEWARE:	The rscsi binary will be installed suid root
				as this is the preferred way of setting it up.
